subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Lord! Thou seest what Thou seest, and Thou witnessest what Thou dost witness, and Thou beholdest, O my Beloved, how I have been afflicted [3.5s]... ...Before Me, riseth up the Serpent of wrath with jaws stretched to engulf Me, and behind Me stalketh the lion of anger intent on tearing Me in pieces
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی و سیدی تری ما تری و تشهد ما تشهد و تنظر یا محبوبی کیف ابتلیت
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
